ddls:
CREATE TABLE "quizzes" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the quiz */,
  "plays" INTEGER /* Number of times the quiz has been played */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the quiz */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the quiz */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the quiz is featured on the platform */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the quiz was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quiz */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the quiz (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "time_limit" INTEGER /* Time limit for the quiz in minutes */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score achievable in the quiz */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "plays" INTEGER /* Number of times the game has been played */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the game */,
  "featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the game is featured on the platform */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date the game was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., puzzle, trivia, adventure) */,
  "time_limit" INTEGER /* Time limit for the game in minutes */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum score achievable in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, creator, player) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_creators" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the quiz */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the quiz was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_creators" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the game */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the game was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz being played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user playing the quiz */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the quiz was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the quiz in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_play_history_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user playing the game */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "time_taken" INTEGER /* Time taken to complete the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_play_history_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the quiz */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_ratings_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given to the game */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_ratings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz being commented on */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user giving the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was given */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the comment being replied to (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "parent_tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent tag (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_tags" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  "tagged_date" TEXT /* Date the quiz was tagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_tags" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tag */,
  "tagged_date" TEXT /* Date the game was tagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., thumbnail, banner) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of video (e.g., trailer, tutorial) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio file */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL of the audio file */,
  "audio_type" TEXT /* Type of audio (e.g., music, sound effect) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the audio file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who unlocked the achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "unlock_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was unlocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz or game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz or game */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the user */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the leaderboard entry was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz or game being reported */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the quiz or game being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the report */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
